# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = ep2_meiji
ep2_meiji.4 = { # Boshin War - Historical
	type = country_event
	placement = root

	duration = 3

	title = ep2_meiji.4.t
	desc = ep2_meiji.4.d
	flavor = ep2_meiji.4.f

    event_image = {
		video = "ep2_japanese_artillery"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_military.dds"

	cooldown = { days = long_modifier_time }

	cancellation_trigger = {

	}

	immediate = {
		random_country = {
			limit = {
				civil_war_origin_country ?= ROOT
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				var:civil_war_type_var ?= movement_type:movement_tokugawa_loyalist
			}
			save_scope_as = tokugawa_scope
			ruler = {
				save_scope_as = shogun_scope
			}
		}
		random_interest_group = {
			limit = {
				is_in_government = yes
			}
			leader = {
				save_scope_as = councilor_scope
			}
		}
	}

	option = { # Play as the Emperor
		name = ep2_meiji.4.a
		default_option = yes
	}

	option = { # Play as the Tokugawa
		name = ep2_meiji.4.b
		trigger = {
			is_player = yes
		}
		play_as = scope:tokugawa_scope
	}
}

ep2_meiji.41 = { # Boshin War - Ahistorical
	type = country_event
	placement = root

	duration = 3

	title = ep2_meiji.4.t
	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					OR = {
						has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
						country_has_former_shogun_in_government = yes
						country_is_taikunate = yes
					}
				}
				desc = ep2_meiji.41.d
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					always = yes
				}
				desc = ep2_meiji.41.d_1
			}
		}
	}
	flavor = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					OR = {
						has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
						country_has_former_shogun_in_government = yes
						country_is_taikunate = yes
					}
				}
				desc = ep2_meiji.41.f
			}
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = {
					always = yes
				}
				desc = ep2_meiji.41.f_1
			}
		}
	}

    event_image = {
		video = "ep2_japanese_artillery"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_military.dds"

	cooldown = { days = long_modifier_time }

	cancellation_trigger = {

	}

	immediate = {
		generate_1_noble_name = {
			CULTURE_1 = primary_culture
		}
		random_country = {
			limit = {
				civil_war_origin_country ?= ROOT
				is_secessionist = no
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				var:civil_war_type_var ?= movement_type:movement_meiji_restorationist
			}
			save_scope_as = imperial_court_scope
			ordered_scope_state = {
				limit = {
					is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_home_islands
				}
				order_by = gdp
				position = 0
				save_scope_as = revolter_state
			}
		}
		random_scope_character = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = shogun_var
			}
			save_scope_as = shogun_scope
		}
	}
	option = { # Play as the Tokugawa
		name = ep2_meiji.41.a
		default_option = yes
	}

	option = { # Play as the Emperor
		name = ep2_meiji.41.b
		trigger = {
			is_player = yes
		}
		play_as = scope:imperial_court_scope
	}
	
	after = {
		clear_generated_names = yes
	}
}
